summary: Customer called to inquire about the readiness of a 2005 Chevy Silverado with a fuel pump issue.
Customer requested a callback before closing time to confirm if they can pick up the vehicle.
Customer provided a contact number for the callback.
raw_transcript: I, I good afternoon, this is bank of reno cheese calling for the Chevy. Silverado, 2005 with the feel pump was just wondering if it was about ready, so I can head out that way. Before closing time. Thanks. Bye. Call me back at 5. 052091574 bye.
